docs.text: Release checklist requires changelog updates, smoke tests, docs validation, and package integrity checks before tagging.
Main branch protection enforces status checks, pull request review, linear history, and conversation resolution.
Insight command should load journal and decision blocks, generate a report, and save summary back to chain.
Model D coordinator broadcasts proposals to remote agents, ingests vote responses, and tracks delivery outcomes.
Proactive assistant sends formatted reminders to Telegram when bot token and chat id are configured.
Vault DID encoding uses base58btc multibase with Ed25519 multicodec prefix instead of hexadecimal output.
Vault phase one verification includes Rust crypto tests, bridge adapter tests, and HTTP vault route integration checks.
Retrieval benchmark gate evaluates tuned recall, tuned MRR, and regression drift against historical comparable runs.
CLI startup benchmark measures process cold-start latency and reports p50 p95 p99 timings.
TUI refresh benchmark measures frame render loop latency with deterministic synthetic updates.
Sync push command sends local chain blocks to registered peers and reports failures per peer DID.
Sync pull command requests remote chain updates from a selected agent and merges missing blocks.
Trade offer exports selected block range to signed payload for recipient DID acceptance workflow.
MCP server supports stdio and HTTP transport, schema mode, serve-once mode, and bounded session duration.
Doctor command checks provider reachability, query latency, DID presence, and configuration hygiene.
Embedding store supports vector insert, tuned semantic search, and deterministic fallback scoring in tests.
Chain verify validates sequential index, prev hash continuity, block hash integrity, and malformed JSON recovery.
Bootstrap wizard generates environment configuration, validates profile choices, and can run in dry-run mode.
